global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on security and simplicity.
global.main_message: Promoting Swiftstack's secure and simple solutions.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Swiftstack logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the word 'Swiftstack' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including a circle and a rectangle, in a muted color palette, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: More abstract shapes that complement the main subject, arranged in a visually appealing manner.

elements.label: Shape cluster
elements.description: A cluster of smaller shapes that add visual interest, positioned slightly above the center.

elements.label: Secure & simple
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Secure & simple' in a clear, legible font, centrally located.

elements.label: Tagline
elements.description: Smaller text that reads 'Built for peace of mind', positioned below the main body text.

elements.label: $4.99 price
elements.description: A prominent price tag displayed in a bold font, located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A call-to-action button labeled 'Learn more', designed to stand out with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Text that conveys the main message of the ad, emphasizing security and simplicity.
elements.text_content: Secure simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A clear and inviting button that encourages users to take action, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Swiftstack logo
elements.description: The logo of Swiftstack, displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with soft colors, Swiftstack logo, secure and simple message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, main subject and body text are centered, with the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Swiftstack, Secure simple, Built for peace of mind, $4.99, Learn more
